title: Aptitude: Letter and Symbol Series - Q11

content.problemStatement:
### **Aptitude Practice Question**

What should come in place of the question mark in the following series? ZF#  7M$  &G9  %@K ? (a) JDI 
(b) 4I6 
(c) 6IJ 
(d) 6#J 
(e) None of these

---

### **Answer & Explanation**

(d) 6#J Explanation:

Given series - Y Z # 8 F H 7 $ 3 M O & 9 7 G Q % K X @ 4 6 J I # D T S 8 $ 
Therefore, option (d) is the correct answer.
